title: Game State Persistence
description: Implement save/load functionality for the trade game. Serialize game state including current gold, routes, contracts, headquarters locations, cart/horse ownership, and turn number. Allow resuming from saved state. Support multiple save slots.
definition-of-done: Save game works correctly. Load game restores all state. Multiple save slots available. Auto-save on turn end.
testing-plan: Test save creates valid file. Verify load restores exact state. Test multiple save slots. Confirm auto-save works.
